steps.text: When the big hand points to 12, it is o'clock. The clock is showing three.
Tap 12 to make it three o'clock!
Three o'clock! Big hand at the top — that always means o'clock. When the big hand reaches the bottom, it is half past.
Tap 6 — half of the clock has gone around!
Half past three! Big hand at the bottom — that always means half past. Let's try another.
The clock now shows seven. Tap 12 — make it seven o'clock!
Seven o'clock! Big hand at the top again — o'clock is always 12. Now tap 6 — make it half past seven!
steps.feedback: Half past seven! O'clock, then half past — the big hand goes from 12 to 6. You know them both now!
